Extension.Name: PulseAudio
Extension.Author: Ritze
Extension.Description: Audio tuning for PulseAudio (and PipeWire's pulse compat layer).

Latency.Name: Latency (ms)
Latency.Description: PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC — force this much client buffering. Raising it (e.g. 60-90) fixes laggy, crackly or stuttering game audio at the cost of a little delay. 0 = leave default.

Routing.Name: Output Device
Routing.Description: PULSE_SINK — name of the sink to send this game's audio to (e.g. a headset). Use `pactl list short sinks` to find names. Empty = default output.

Properties.Name: Tag As Game
Properties.Description: PULSE_PROP media.role=game — mark the stream's role as 'game' so audio policy can route/duck it appropriately.
